item.title: Former Dividend Aristocrat AT&T Posts Strong Earnings, Tries to Win Back Investors
item.description: AT&T beat Q1 2026 earnings estimates, posted record broadband results, and reiterated guidance, sending shares up nearly 3% on April 23.

item.title: Procter & Gamble Gave the Market What It Wanted: A Reason to Buy
item.description: Procter & Gamble's stock price is rebounding following the FQ3 release and can continue higher in 2026, driven by consumer resilience.

item.title: Freeport-McMoRan: Grasberg Restarts, Now the Real Work Begins
item.description: Freeport-McMoRan stock drops after earnings as Grasberg ramp concerns offset strong copper and gold prices and a solid EPS beat

item.title: Churchill Downs: The Derby Is Just the Beginning
item.description: Churchill Downs stock is rising on HRM growth and a strategic Preakness IP deal, showing the company is far more than just the Kentucky Derby

item.title: Vertiv Keeps Chugging, Price Targets Flip to the Upside
item.description: Vertiv continues to ride the AI data center wave, with the firm posting very strong results in its first quarter of 2026.
